creator: drpatton@embarqmail.com
text:
I tried to install FreeBSD and the OS doesn't recognize the wireless
mouse.   It is a Microsoft combo Wireless keyboard & mouse.  The keyboard
appears to work; However, the mouse is not functioning at all.  The
Receiver is a USB device (Microsoft Wireless Desktop Receiver 2.1).  The
mouse is a MS Wireless mouse 2000.  I'm running a HP machine w/512MB &
Athlon 2800+ CPU.  USB is 2.1
